mapper.sql: test_id, title, version, app_url, steps, variables, tags, expected_report, project_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_testflow WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_testflow WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM t_testflow WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM t_testflow WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_testflow
title = #{title}, version = #{version}, app_url = #{appUrl}, steps = #{steps}, variables = #{variables}, tags = #{tags}, expected_report = #{expectedReport}, project_id = #{projectId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM t_testflow WHERE title = #{title} AND deleted = 0 )
